name: Donanemab
summary: Amyloid-plaque monoclonal antibody with phase 3 early-Alzheimer's evidence for amyloid clearance and slowing of clinical progression.
mechanism_summary: Targets insoluble modified amyloid-beta in plaques and supports plaque removal, with treatment stopped in trial participants meeting amyloid-clearance criteria.

open_questions: Whether amyloid clearance translates into durable benefit in broader or earlier populations
How ARIA risk changes net benefit across APOE and disease-stage strata
